languages.text: "Меня защищает Бог-Император, капитан-интендант. Оспаривая мои повеления, ты оспариваешь Его волю".
"The God-Emperor protects me, Captain-Quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."
languages.original_text: "Меня защищает Бог-Император, капитан-интендант. Оспаривая мои повеления, ты оспариваешь Его волю".

traits.locale_text: "The God-Emperor protects me, Captain-Quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."
"The God-Emperor protects me, captain-quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."
"The God-Emperor protects me, Captain-Quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."
"The God-Emperor protects me, Captain-Quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."
"The God-Emperor protects me, captain-quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."

languages.text: 「神皇帝が私を守ってくださる、艦長補佐。私の命令に異議を唱えるということは、神皇帝の御意に異議を唱えることだ」
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor protects me, Captain-Quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝が私を守ってくださる、艦長補佐。私の命令に異議を唱えるということは、神皇帝の御意に異議を唱えることですよ。」

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator beni korur Levazımcı Yüzbaşı. Emirlerime karşı gelerek O'nun iradesine karşı geliyorsun."
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor protects me, captain-quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator beni korur Levazımcı Yüzbaşı. Emirlerime karşı gelerek O'nun iradesine karşı geliyorsun."

languages.text: «El Dios Emperador me protege, capitana intendente. Al cuestionar mis órdenes, cuestiona Su voluntad».
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor protects me, captain-quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."

traits.locale_text: «El Dios Emperador me protege, capitana intendente. Al cuestionar mis órdenes, cuestiona Su voluntad».

languages.text: “神皇庇佑着我，军需官上尉。质疑我的命令，就是在质疑祂的旨意。”
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor protects me, captain-quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."

traits.locale_text: “神皇庇佑着我，军需官上尉。质疑我的命令，就是在质疑祂的旨意。”

languages.text: « L'Empereur-Dieu veille sur moi, capitaine-quartier-maître. En refusant de suivre mes ordres, c'est Sa volonté que vous bafouez. »
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor protects me, captain-quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."

traits.locale_text: « L'Empereur-Dieu veille sur moi, capitaine-quartier-maître. En refusant de suivre mes ordres, c'est Sa volonté que vous bafouez. »

languages.text: "Der Gottimperator schützt mich, Captain-Quartiermeisterin. Stellt Ihr meine Befehle infrage, widersetzt Ihr Euch Seinem Willen."
languages.original_text: "The God-Emperor protects me, captain-quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."

traits.locale_text: "Der Gottimperator schützt mich, Captain-Quartiermeisterin. Stellt Ihr meine Befehle infrage, widersetzt Ihr Euch Seinem Willen."
